title: winey crisp tunisian bread
description: indulgent wholegrain bread served in a bain-marie, perfect as a side dish or light meal. This recipe is shojin-friendly, making it suitable for vegans and those following a plant-based diet.
instructions: Cut the whole wheat bread into 1-inch cubes and place in a baking dish.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, minced rosemary, garlic, lemon juice, and salt.
Pour the mixture over the bread and toss to coat.
Add water to the bread mixture and stir well.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the bread is crispy.
Serve the bread warm, straight from the oven.
Bain-marie: place the bread in a heat-proof bowl and set it over a pot of simmering water, allowing the bread to warm without cooking further.
Serve the warm bread in a bain-marie, garnished with fresh rosemary if desired.
